title: Anna's Beef Loin
excerpt: Ingredients 2 kg whole piece of beef loin Bovril to taste English mustard to taste Olive oil as needed seasoned flour as needed coarsely ground black pepper to taste Method Place the loin on a wooden board and coat the whole loin with Bovril. Then coat with the mustard, and lastly with olive oil. Sift flour over …
html:
Ingredients

  • 2 kg whole piece of beef loin
  • Bovril to taste
  • English mustard to taste
  • Olive oil as needed
  • seasoned flour as needed
  • coarsely ground black pepper to taste

Method

Place the loin on a wooden board and coat the whole loin with Bovril. Then coat with the mustard, and lastly with olive oil. Sift flour over the whole loin and place it in a roasting pan.

Bake in a preheated oven at 240ºC for 20 minutes. Then lower the heat to 190ºC and bake for another 30 to 40 minutes – this will give you a medium-rare result. If you'd like the meat more well-done, bake for another 30 minutes or use a meat thermometer. Baste the loin about three times during the baking time with the juices in the pan.

Remove the loin from the oven and place on a wooden board. Let it rest for at least 30 minutes before serving.

Serves 8 with salads or roasted vegetables, horseradish sauce and a tasty gravy made from the pan juices.

Easy!
